Level 1 treats each checkpoint as a concrete case (suspended runtime); Fork implements retrieve-and-reuse, Value Override implements revision with automatic stale-boundary propagation. Level 2 treats each compiled plan as an abstract case; the compilation pipeline is itself a NormCode plan, enabling recursive case learning. Three structural properties follow: (C1) direct checkpoint inspection; (C2) pre-execution review via compiler-generated narrative; (C3) scope-bounded selective re-execution. Four deployed plans serve as structured evidence: PPT Generation produces presentation decks at ~40s per slide on commercial APIs; Code Assistant carries out multi-step software-engineering tasks spanning up to ten reasoning cycles; NC Compilations converts natural-language specifications into executable NormCode plans; and Canvas Assistant, when connected to an external AI code editor, automates plan debugging. Together these plans form a self-sustaining ecosystem in which plans produce, debug, and refine one another -- realizing cumulative case-based learning at system scale.

</details>


### [865] [An Empirical Investigation of Pre-Trained Deep Learning Model Reuse in the Scientific Process](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13584)
*Nicholas M. Synovic,Karolina Ryzka,Alessandra V. Vellucci Solari,Kenny Lyons,James C. Davis,George K. Thiruvathukal*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 该研究首次对自然科学领域预训练模型重用模式进行实证分析，通过自动化LLM驱动流程分析17,511篇论文，发现生物化学领域PTM重用最活跃，适应性重用是最普遍模式，且对科学过程的"测试"阶段影响最大。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在自然科学中应用广泛，但科学家面临从头训练特定项目模型的高技术成本和计算复杂度。虽然软件工程社区提倡重用预训练模型来分摊成本，但自然科学领域PTM重用的实际使用情况和影响缺乏实证评估。

Method: 采用自动化大语言模型驱动流程，分析2000年1月1日至2025年12月10日期间的17,511篇同行评审开放获取论文，识别PTM重用情况，按科学领域、重用模式分类，并评估对科学过程的影响。

Result: 1) "生物化学、遗传学和分子生物学"领域在PTM重用方面领先其他自然科学领域；2) "适应性"重用是所有自然科学领域中最普遍的PTM重用模式；3) PTM集成对科学过程的"测试"阶段影响最大，这与利用计算方法进行高通量、数据驱动科学研究日益增长的兴趣相符。

Conclusion: 该研究首次系统刻画了自然科学领域PTM重用实践，评估了其对科学过程的影响，为未来PTM重用的实施和更广泛科学意义研究奠定了基础，揭示了计算密集型科学研究的趋势。

Abstract: Deep learning has achieved recognition for its impact within natural sciences, however scientists are inhibited by the prohibitive technical cost and computational complexity of training project specific models from scratch. Following software engineering community guidance, natural scientists are reusing pre-trained deep learning models (PTMs) to amortize these costs. While prior works recommend PTM reuse patterns, to our knowledge, little work has been done to empirically evaluate their usage and impact within the natural sciences.
  We present the first empirical study of PTM reuse patterns in the natural sciences, quantifying the utilization and impact of conceptual, adaptation, and deployment reuse within the scientific process. Leveraging an automated large language model driven pipeline, we analyze 17,511 peer reviewed, open access papers to identify PTM reuse by scientific field, associated reuse patterns, and the impact of PTM integration into the scientific process from January 1st, 2000 to December 10th, 2025. Our results show that "Biochemistry, Genetics and Molecular Biology" has outpaced other natural scientific fields in PTM reuse, "adaptation" reuse is the most prevalent PTM reuse pattern identified across all natural science fields, and the "Test" stage of the scientific process has been most impacted by PTM integration. This aligns with the growing interest of leveraging computational methods to conduct high throughput, data driven scientific research. Our work characterizes and identifies current PTM reuse practices within the natural sciences, evaluates their impact on the scientific process, and establishes a foundation for future work into the implementation and broader scientific implications of PTM reuse.

</details>


### [866] [Microservice Architecture Patterns for Scalable Machine Learning Systems](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13672)
*Sowjanya Karanam,Jayanth Bhargav*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文回顾了Netflix、Uber和Google等公司如何利用微服务架构管理机器学习系统，通过模拟研究展示了微服务设计能降低延迟、提升可扩展性，实现更高效的机器学习应用。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器学习在现代系统中的核心地位日益增强，组织在管理、部署和扩展模型方面面临新挑战。微服务架构通过将复杂系统分解为独立组件，为应对这些挑战提供了解决方案。

Method: 论文采用文献综述方法，分析Netflix、Uber和Google等主要公司的实际案例，研究它们如何将微服务应用于机器学习任务（训练、部署、监控）。同时通过模拟研究评估微服务设计的性能表现。

Result: 模拟研究表明，基于微服务的设计能够显著降低延迟并提高可扩展性，使机器学习应用在现实世界和大规模系统中变得更快速、高效和响应迅速。

Conclusion: 微服务架构是构建高效、可扩展机器学习系统的有效方法，特别适用于推荐系统等大规模应用场景，能够帮助组织更好地应对机器学习系统管理中的挑战。

Abstract: Machine learning is now a central part of how modern systems are built and used, powering everything from personalized recommendations to large-scale business analytics. As its role grows, organizations are facing new challenges in managing, deploying, and scaling these models efficiently. One approach that has gained wide adoption is the use of microservice architectures, which break complex machine learning systems into smaller, independent parts that can be built, updated, and scaled on their own. In this paper, we review how major companies such as Netflix, Uber, and Google use microservices to handle key machine learning tasks like training, deployment, and monitoring. We discuss the main challenges involved in designing such systems and explore how microservices fit into large-scale applications, particularly in recommendation systems. We also present some simulation studies showing that microservice-based designs can reduce latency and improve scalability, leading to faster, more efficient, and more responsive machine learning applications in real-world and large-scale systems.

</details>


### [867] [Do AI Agents Really Improve Code Readability?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13723)
*Kyogo Horikawa,Kosei Horikawa,Yutaro Kashiwa,Hidetake Uwano,Hajimu Iida*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI代理重构主要针对逻辑复杂性和文档改进，但与传统质量指标存在冲突：可维护性指数下降，圈复杂度上升


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代码可读性对软件质量和可维护性至关重要。虽然AI代理方法在自动重构方面显示出潜力，但现有研究覆盖所有重构形式，不清楚AI代理重构在多大程度上专门改善代码可读性。

Method: 从AIDev数据集中提取包含可读性相关关键词的提交，分析403个提交前后可读性指标的变化，使用多种定量指标进行评估。

Result: AI代理主要针对逻辑复杂性（42.4%）和文档改进（24.2%），而非命名约定或格式化等表面层面。但可读性相关提交往往降低传统质量指标：56.1%的提交中可维护性指数下降，42.7%的提交中圈复杂度增加。

Conclusion: AI代理重构在改善可读性方面存在局限性，与传统质量指标存在冲突，需要更平衡的方法来同时优化可读性和代码质量。

Abstract: Code readability is fundamental to software quality and maintainability. Poor readability extends development time, increases bug-inducing risks, and contributes to technical debt. With the rapid advancement of Large Language Models, AI agent-based approaches have emerged as a promising paradigm for automated refactoring, capable of decomposing complex tasks through autonomous planning and execution. While prior studies have examined refactoring by AI agents, these analyses cover all forms of refactoring, including performance optimization and structural improvement. As a result, the extent to which AI agent-based refactoring specifically improves code readability remains unclear.
  This study investigates the impact of AI agent-based refactoring on code readability. We extracted commits containing readability-related keywords from the AIDev dataset and analyzed changes in readability metrics before and after each commit, covering 403 commits evaluated using multiple quantitative metrics. Our results indicate that AI agents primarily target logic complexity (42.4%) and documentation improvements (24.2%) rather than surface-level aspects like naming conventions or formatting. However, contrary to expectations, readability-focused commits often degraded traditional quality metrics: the Maintainability Index decreased in 56.1% of commits, while Cyclomatic Complexity increased in 42.7%.

</details>


### [868] [Testing with AI Agents: An Empirical Study of Test Generation Frequency, Quality, and Coverage](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13724)
*Suzuka Yoshimoto,Shun Fujita,Kosei Horikawa,Daniel Feitosa,Yutaro Kashiwa,Hajimu Iida*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: AI代理编码工具在真实开发场景中生成测试的实证分析：AI贡献了16.4%的测试提交，生成的测试具有独特结构特征（代码更长、断言密度更高但复杂度更低），且能达到与人工编写测试相当的代码覆盖率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然基于代理的编码工具已广泛应用于软件开发，但缺乏对这些工具在真实开发场景中如何生成测试、以及AI生成测试与人工编写测试对比的实证研究。

Method: 使用AIDev数据集进行实证分析，提取2,232个包含测试相关变更的提交，从三个方面进行研究：测试添加频率、生成测试的结构特征、以及对代码覆盖率的影响。

Result: 1) AI贡献了所有添加测试提交的16.4%；2) AI生成的测试方法具有独特结构模式：代码更长、断言密度更高，但通过线性逻辑保持较低的圈复杂度；3) AI生成的测试能达到与人工编写测试相当的代码覆盖率，在多个项目中经常实现正向覆盖率提升。

Conclusion: 基于代理的编码工具在真实开发中已显著参与测试生成，其生成的测试具有独特的结构特征，且能有效提升代码覆盖率，表明AI测试生成在软件开发中具有实际应用价值。

Abstract: Agent-based coding tools have transformed software development practices. Unlike prompt-based approaches that require developers to manually integrate generated code, these agent-based tools autonomously interact with repositories to create, modify, and execute code, including test generation. While many developers have adopted agent-based coding tools, little is known about how these tools generate tests in real-world development scenarios or how AI-generated tests compare to human-written ones.
  This study presents an empirical analysis of test generation by agent-based coding tools using the AIDev dataset. We extracted 2,232 commits containing test-related changes and investigated three aspects: the frequency of test additions, the structural characteristics of the generated tests, and their impact on code coverage. Our findings reveal that (i) AI authored 16.4% of all commits adding tests in real-world repositories, (ii) AI-generated test methods exhibit distinct structural patterns, featuring longer code and a higher density of assertions while maintaining lower cyclomatic complexity through linear logic, and (iii) AI-generated tests contribute to code coverage comparable to human-written tests, frequently achieving positive coverage gains across several projects.

</details>


### [869] [SeqTG: Scalable Combinatorial Test Generation via Sequential Integer Linear Programming](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13963)
*Sitong Yang,Wanying Bao,Yinyin Song,Yueting Cheng,Qian Li,Chao Wei*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SeqTG：基于顺序整数线性规划的覆盖阵列生成框架，通过贪心预热和ILP优化解决组合测试中的"收益递减"问题，实现更紧凑的测试套件


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 组合测试中，传统贪心算法存在"收益递减"问题：初期高效覆盖交互，但后期产生冗余测试套件。精确数学规划理论上可解决此问题，但因组合爆炸而难以扩展。

Method: 提出SeqTG框架，采用顺序整数线性规划方法。包含三个阶段：1)约束优先阶段，通过图划分处理必须包含的要求；2)增量优化阶段，使用顺序ILP处理剩余交互；3)全局最小化阶段，通过集合覆盖消除冗余。

Result: 在标准基准测试和200个大规模配置上的评估表明，SeqTG有效消除了后期膨胀，实现了最先进的测试套件紧凑性和严格的约束遵守。

Conclusion: SeqTG首次将精确数学建模成功应用于组合测试，通过贪心预热策略克服了可扩展性障碍，为组合测试生成提供了新的高效解决方案。

Abstract: Combinatorial Testing (CT) is essential for detecting interaction-triggered faults, yet generating minimal Covering Arrays under complex constraints remains an unresolved NP-hard challenge. Current greedy algorithms are highly scalable but suffer from severe ``diminishing returns'': they efficiently cover initial interactions but produce bloated, redundant test suites when struggling to pack the final few difficult pairs. While exact mathematical programming could theoretically address this inefficiency, it has historically been intractable due to combinatorial explosion. In this paper, we pioneer the application of exact mathematical modeling to CT by introducing SeqTG, a scalable framework based on Sequential Integer Linear Programming (ILP). To circumvent the scalability barrier, SeqTG employs a novel Warm-Start strategy: a rapid greedy initialization first clears the ``easy'' interactions, allowing the rigorous ILP solver to exclusively optimize the fragmented, difficult-to-cover remainder. The pipeline operates in three stages: (1) a Constraint-First phase grouping must-include requirements via graph partitioning; (2) an Incremental Optimization phase targeting the remaining interactions with sequential ILP; and (3) a Global Minimization phase eliminating redundancies via set-covering. Extensive evaluations across standard benchmarks and 200 large-scale configurations validate the framework's efficacy. The results demonstrate that SeqTG effectively eradicates late-stage bloat, achieving state-of-the-art test suite compactness and strict constraint adherence.

</details>


### [870] [ReqToCode: Embedding Requirements Traceability as a Structural Property of the Codebase](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13999)
*Thorsten Schlathölter*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ReqToCode通过在代码库中直接嵌入可追踪的系统元素，将可追溯性变为编译时可验证的系统属性，而非外部文档任务，从而防止追踪链退化。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 安全关键软件开发中的需求可追溯性仍然严重依赖外部文档，这些文档与所描述的系统分离维护。这种分离引入了结构脆弱性：随着需求、代码和测试在不同工具、仓库和版本中独立演化，追踪链会无声地退化。现有的LLM方法主要关注事后恢复断裂的链接，这是一种固有的回顾性方法。

Method: 引入ReqToCode方法，核心概念是"可追踪元素"——一种语言原生的、生成的代码元素，代表单个需求并携带其元数据。开发者在实现和测试代码中引用这些可追踪元素，创建硬性的双向链接，在构建过程中自动验证。当需求变更时，系统通过分级生命周期（从弃用警告到构建失败）响应，提供可操作的信号而非突然中断。

Result: 该方法将可追溯性从外部文档任务转变为编译时可验证的系统属性，防止追踪链退化，并在需求变更时提供渐进式的反馈机制。

Conclusion: ReqToCode通过将可追溯性嵌入代码库本身，解决了传统需求追踪方法的结构脆弱性问题，提供了一种预防性的、编译时可验证的解决方案，优于现有的回顾性修复方法。

Abstract: Requirements traceability in safety-critical software development remains largely dependent on external documentation maintained separately from the systems it describes. This separation introduces structural fragility: traces degrade silently as requirements, code, and tests evolve independently across tools, repositories, and revisions. Recent advances in LLM-based traceability focus on recovering broken links after the fact - an inherently retrospective approach. This paper introduces ReqToCode, an approach that prevents trace degradation by embedding traceable system elements directly into the codebase, making traceability a compile-time verifiable property of the system rather than an external documentation task. Central to the approach is the concept of the Traceable - a language-native, generated code element that represents a single requirement and carries its metadata. Developers reference Traceables in implementation and test code, creating hard, bidirectional links that are validated automatically during the build process. When requirements change, the system responds through a graduated lifecycle - from deprecation warnings to build failures - providing teams with actionable signals rather than abrupt breakage. We describe the approach, its architectural principles, the Traceable lifecycle, and illustrate it with a generic example spanning requirement definition, artifact generation, code integration, and build-time validation.

</details>


### [871] [LegacyTranslate: LLM-based Multi-Agent Method for Legacy Code Translation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14054)
*Zahra Moti,Heydar Soudani,Jonck van der Kogel*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LegacyTranslate是一个多智能体框架，用于API感知的代码翻译，在金融系统将250万行PL/SQL迁移到Java的现代化项目中，通过三个专门LLM智能体显著提升翻译质量和可集成性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 企业环境中大型遗留系统现代化面临重大挑战，特别是迁移时需要保留领域特定逻辑同时符合内部架构框架和共享API。直接使用LLM进行代码翻译常产生语法有效但无法编译或集成到现有生产框架的代码，限制了在实际现代化项目中的应用。

Method: 提出LegacyTranslate多智能体框架，包含三个专门LLM智能体：初始翻译智能体使用检索的上下文示例生成初始Java翻译；API基础智能体通过从API知识库检索相关条目使代码与现有API对齐；精炼智能体使用编译器反馈和API建议迭代精炼输出以提高正确性。

Result: 实验显示每个智能体都对翻译质量有贡献：初始翻译智能体单独实现45.6%可编译输出和30.9%测试通过率；加入API基础智能体和精炼智能体后，编译率额外提升8%，测试通过准确率增加3%。

Conclusion: LegacyTranslate框架通过多智能体协作有效解决了企业环境中API感知的代码翻译问题，显著提高了代码翻译的可编译性和集成能力，在实际金融系统现代化项目中展现出实用价值。

Abstract: Modernizing large legacy systems remains a major challenge in enterprise environments, particularly when migration must preserve domain-specific logic while conforming to internal architectural frameworks and shared APIs. Direct application of Large Language Models (LLMs) for code translation often produces syntactically valid outputs that fail to compile or integrate within existing production frameworks, limiting their practical adoption in real-world modernization efforts. In this paper, we propose LegacyTranslate, a multi-agent framework for API-aware code translation, developed and evaluated in the context of an ongoing modernization effort at a financial institution migrating approximately 2.5 million lines of PL/SQL to Java. The core idea is to use specialized LLM-based agents, each addressing a different aspect of the translation challenge. Specifically, LegacyTranslate consists of three agents: Initial Translation Agent produces an initial Java translation using retrieved in-context examples; API Grounding Agent aligns the code with existing APIs by retrieving relevant entries from an API knowledge base; and Refinement Agent iteratively refines the output using compiler feedback and API suggestions to improve correctness. Our experiments show that each agent contributes to better translation quality. The Initial Translation Agent alone achieves 45.6% compilable outputs and 30.9% test-pass rate. With API Grounding Agent and Refinement Agent, compilation improves by an additional 8% and test-pass accuracy increases by 3%.

</details>


### [872] [DeepFix: Debugging and Fixing Machine Learning Workflow using Agentic AI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14099)
*Fadel Mamar Seydou,Arnab Sharma*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: DeepFix是一个基于智能AI框架的自动化机器学习管道测试工具，能够检测ML软件中的潜在bug，生成详细的bug报告（包括严重性排名、解释和修复建议），并支持多种ML系统类型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 机器学习系统在关键应用中部署越来越多，但由于复杂的模型架构、巨大的输入空间和不断变化的部署环境，系统测试仍然具有挑战性。现有测试方法通常基于给定需求生成测试用例，难以揭示现代ML模型的关键bug，且无法提供修复错误的指导。

Method: 首先使用Deepchecks测试ML软件中的潜在bug，然后采用基于智能AI的方法生成详细的bug报告，包括基于bug严重性的排名、易于非数据科学专家理解的解释，以及可能的修复方法。

Result: DeepFix支持多种类型的ML软件系统，可轻松集成到任何ML工作流中，实现开发周期中的持续测试。已验证案例表明，该智能测试过程能够揭示传统测试方法未能检测到的隐藏故障模式。

Conclusion: DeepFix提供了一个全面的自动化ML管道测试解决方案，不仅能够检测bug，还能提供修复指导，解决了现有测试方法的局限性，有助于提高ML系统的可靠性和可维护性。

Abstract: In recent years, machine learning (ML) based software systems are increasingly deployed in several critical applications, yet systematic testing of their behavior remains challenging due to complex model architectures, large input spaces, and evolving deployment environments. Existing testing approaches often rely on generating test cases based on given requirements, which often fail to reveal critical bugs of modern ML models due to their complex nature. Most importantly, such approaches, although they can be used to detect the presence of specific failures in the ML software, they hardly provide any message as to how to fix such errors. To tackle this, in this paper, we present DeepFix, a tool for automated testing of the entire ML pipeline using an agentic AI framework. Our testing approach first leverages Deepchecks to test the ML software for any potential bugs, and thereafter, uses an agentic AI-based approach to generate a detailed bug report. This includes a ranking, based on the severity of the found bugs, along with their explanations, which can be interpreted easily by any non-data science experts and most importantly, also provides possible ways to fix these bugs. Additionally, DeepFix supports several types of ML software systems and can be integrated easily to any ML workflow, enabling continuous testing throughout the development lifecycle. We discuss our already validated cases as well as some planned validations designed to demonstrate how the agentic testing process can reveal hidden failure modes that remain undetected by conventional testing methods. A 5-minute screencast demonstrating the tool's core functionality is available at https://youtu.be/WfwZmFcQgBQ.

</details>


### [873] [Mining the YARA Ecosystem: From Ad-Hoc Sharing to Data-Driven Threat Intelligence](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14191)
*Dectot--Le Monnier de Gouville Esteban,Mohammad Hamdaqa,Moataz Chouchen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 对YARA规则生态系统的首次大规模研究发现：虽然静态质量评分很高，但实际运行效果差，存在高误报和低召回率，生态系统高度集中且严重过时。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: YARA已成为"检测即代码"的事实标准，但其开源生态系统缺乏实证研究。目前从业者依赖公共仓库，但对其结构特征、维护动态和操作可靠性缺乏了解。

Method: 混合方法研究：从1,853个GitHub仓库挖掘840万条规则，通过仓库挖掘映射供应链动态，静态分析评估语法质量，动态基准测试（针对4,026个恶意软件和2,000个良性软件）衡量操作有效性。

Result: 生态系统高度集中（10位作者驱动80%规则采用）；作为"静态供应链"运行（中位不活跃期782天，技术滞后4.2年）；静态质量高（平均99.4/100）但操作效果差（高误报、低召回）；覆盖偏向传统威胁（勒索软件），现代初始访问向量（加载器、窃取器）严重不足。

Conclusion: 公共仓库更像是原始数据转储而非精心策划的源，揭示了"双重惩罚"问题：防御者为过时情报付出高性能开销。需要从临时收集转向严格规则工程，并发布了数据集和流水线支持未来数据驱动的管理工具。

Abstract: YARA has established itself as the de facto standard for "Detection as Code," enabling analysts and DevSecOps practitioners to define signatures for malware identification across the software supply chain. Despite its pervasive use, the open-source YARA ecosystem remains characterized by ad-hoc sharing and opaque quality. Practitioners currently rely on public repositories without empirical evidence regarding the ecosystem's structural characteristics, maintenance and diffusion dynamics, or operational reliability. We conducted a large-scale mixed-method study of 8.4 million rules mined from 1,853 GitHub repositories. Our pipeline integrates repository mining to map supply chain dynamics, static analysis to assess syntactic quality, and dynamic benchmarking against 4,026 malware and 2,000 goodware samples to measure operational effectiveness. We reveal a highly centralized structure where 10 authors drive 80% of rule adoption. The ecosystem functions as a "static supply chain": repositories show a median inactivity of 782 days and a median technical lag of 4.2 years. While static quality scores appear high (mean = 99.4/100), operational benchmarking uncovers significant noise (false positives) and low recall. Furthermore, coverage is heavily biased toward legacy threats (Ransomware), leaving modern initial access vectors (Loaders, Stealers) severely underrepresented. These findings expose a systemic "double penalty": defenders incur high performance overhead for decayed intelligence. We argue that public repositories function as raw data dumps rather than curated feeds, necessitating a paradigm shift from ad-hoc collection to rigorous rule engineering. We release our dataset and pipeline to support future data-driven curation tools.

</details>


### [874] [ITKIT: Feasible CT Image Analysis based on SimpleITK and MMEngine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14255)
*Yiqin Zhang,Meiling Chen*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ITKIT是一个医学图像分析框架，提供从DICOM到3D分割推理的完整流程，旨在为不同计算能力的用户提供易用且可配置的解决方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然已有许多开源医学图像分析框架，但它们在易用性和可配置性方面仍有改进空间。CT图像作为临床诊断的常用数据格式（DICOM标准），需要一个既能满足基础用户快速上手，又能为高级用户提供灵活配置的框架。

Method: ITKIT提供从DICOM到3D分割推理的完整流程，包含基本实践步骤和高级配置入口。基本实践仅包含必要步骤，使计算能力较弱的用户能通过CLI快速上手；高级用户可使用OneDL-MMEngine框架进行灵活的模型配置和部署。

Result: 通过12个典型实验验证，ITKIT能够满足大多数基础场景的需求，证明其在医学图像分析任务中的有效性和实用性。

Conclusion: ITKIT在易用性和可配置性方面提供了比现有框架更好的选择，为不同技术水平的用户提供了从DICOM数据处理到3D分割推理的完整解决方案，能够满足临床医学图像分析的基本需求。

Abstract: CT images are widely used in clinical diagnosis and treatment, and their data have formed a de facto standard - DICOM. It is clear and easy to use, and can be efficiently utilized by data-driven analysis methods such as deep learning. In the past decade, many program frameworks for medical image analysis have emerged in the open-source community. ITKIT analyzed the characteristics of these frameworks and hopes to provide a better choice in terms of ease of use and configurability. ITKIT offers a complete pipeline from DICOM to 3D segmentation inference. Its basic practice only includes some essential steps, enabling users with relatively weak computing capabilities to quickly get started using the CLI according to the documentation. For advanced users, the OneDL-MMEngine framework provides a flexible model configuration and deployment entry. This paper conducted 12 typical experiments to verify that ITKIT can meet the needs of most basic scenarios.

</details>


### [875] [Trust Over Fear: How Motivation Framing in System Prompts Affects AI Agent Debugging Depth](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14373)
*Wu Ji*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究发现AI编程代理的系统提示中动机框架（信任vs恐惧）显著影响调试性能：信任框架让代理发现更多隐藏问题但步骤更多，恐惧框架无效


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: AI编程代理的系统提示越来越多地使用动机框架（从中性任务描述到恐惧驱动的威胁），但缺乏对照研究验证这些框架是否真正影响代理行为。研究者想探究信任基础与恐惧基础的动机框架如何影响AI代理的调试性能。

Method: 研究1：对照手动实验，比较信任框架方法（NoPUA）与无框架基线，在9个调试场景中使用Claude Sonnet 4。研究2：扩展研究，5次独立自动化运行，3种条件（基线、信任框架、恐惧框架），产生135个场景级数据点。基于自我决定理论、调节焦点理论和满意模型进行分析。

Result: 信任框架代理发现隐藏问题多59%（p=0.002），调查步骤多83%，但表面问题少15%。研究2中信任框架代理调查步骤多74%（p=0.008），隐藏问题多25%（p=0.016）。恐惧框架代理在所有指标上均无显著改进（所有p>0.3）。

Conclusion: 系统提示的动机框架（不仅仅是技术内容）因果性地影响AI代理的调查深度。信任框架诱导探索导向、促进聚焦的行为，而恐惧框架无法让代理从默认的满意策略中转变。恐惧基础的动机对AI代理无效。

Abstract: System prompts for AI coding agents increasingly employ motivational framing -- from neutral task descriptions to fear-driven threats -- yet no controlled study has examined whether such framing affects agent behavior. We present two studies investigating how trust-based versus fear-based motivation framing in system prompts influences AI agent debugging performance. In Study 1, we conducted a controlled manual experiment comparing a trust-framed methodology (NoPUA) against an unframed baseline across 9 debugging scenarios using Claude Sonnet 4. Trust-framed agents found 59% more hidden issues (p = 0.002, d = 2.28) while taking 83% more investigative steps, despite finding 15% fewer surface-level issues -- revealing a depth-over-breadth tradeoff in investigation strategy. In Study 2, we replicated and extended these findings with 5 independent automated runs across 3 conditions (Baseline, NoPUA trust-framed, PUA fear-framed), yielding 135 scenario-level data points. Trust-framed agents again showed significant advantages: +74% investigative steps (p = 0.008) and +25% hidden issues found (p = 0.016). Crucially, fear-framed (PUA) agents showed no significant improvement over baseline on any metric (all p > 0.3), demonstrating that fear-based motivation is ineffective for AI agents. We ground these findings in Self-Determination Theory, regulatory focus theory, and satisficing models, arguing that trust-based framing induces exploration-oriented, promotion-focused behavior while fear-based framing fails to shift agents from default satisficing strategies. Our results suggest that the motivational frame of system prompts -- not just their technical content -- causally influences AI agent investigation depth.

</details>


### [876] [CangjieBench: Benchmarking LLMs on a Low-Resource General-Purpose Programming Language](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14501)
*Junhang Cheng,Fang Liu,Jia Li,Chengru Wu,Nanxiang Jiang,Li Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: CangjieBench是一个针对低资源通用编程语言Cangjie的无污染基准测试，包含248个从HumanEval和ClassEval手动翻译的高质量样本，评估LLM在Text-to-Code和Code-to-Code任务上的表现。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究主要关注领域特定语言(DSL)，而数据稀缺的通用编程语言研究不足。大型语言模型在高资源编程语言上表现良好，但在低资源语言上表现不佳，需要专门的基准测试来评估其泛化能力。

Method: 构建CangjieBench基准，包含248个高质量样本，覆盖Text-to-Code和Code-to-Code任务。在四种设置下系统评估多种LLM：直接生成、语法约束生成、检索增强生成(RAG)和智能体。

Result: 直接生成效果差，语法约束生成在准确性和计算成本之间提供最佳平衡。智能体达到最先进准确性但消耗大量token。Code-to-Code翻译通常不如Text-to-Code生成，表明存在负迁移现象。

Conclusion: 该工作为LLM在未见和低资源编程语言上的泛化提供了有价值的见解。语法约束生成是实用选择，而智能体适合高准确性需求。观察到负迁移现象，表明模型过度拟合源语言模式。

Abstract: Large Language Models excel in high-resource programming languages but struggle with low-resource ones. Existing research related to low-resource programming languages primarily focuses on Domain-Specific Languages (DSLs), leaving general-purpose languages that suffer from data scarcity underexplored. To address this gap, we introduce CangjieBench, a contamination-free benchmark for Cangjie, a representative low-resource general-purpose language. The benchmark comprises 248 high-quality samples manually translated from HumanEval and ClassEval, covering both Text-to-Code and Code-to-Code tasks. We conduct a systematic evaluation of diverse LLMs under four settings: Direct Generation, Syntax-Constrained Generation, Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG), and Agent. Experiments reveal that Direct Generation performs poorly, whereas Syntax-Constrained Generation offers the best trade-off between accuracy and computational cost. Agent achieve state-of-the-art accuracy but incur high token consumption. Furthermore, we observe that Code-to-Code translation often underperforms Text-to-Code generation, suggesting a negative transfer phenomenon where models overfit to the source language patterns. We hope that our work will offer valuable insights into LLM generalization to unseen and low-resource programming languages. Our code and data are available at https://github.com/cjhCoder7/CangjieBench.

</details>


### [877] [ISTQB Certifications Under the Lens: Their Contributions to the Software-Testing Profession; and AI-assisted Synthesis of Practitioners' Endorsements and Criticisms](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14572)
*Vehid Geruslu,Alper Buğra Keleş,Sevde Değirmenci,Zafar Jafarov,Aytan Mövsümova,Atif Namazov*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: ISTQB认证提供职业发展和沟通价值，但实践效用存在争议；AI辅助的多源文献综述结合专家验证，系统评估了该认证的优势与局限。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: ISTQB作为全球最广泛认可的软件测试认证，旨在标准化测试知识体系，但其实际相关性和影响一直存在争议。本研究旨在通过系统收集从业者观点，评估对ISTQB的认可是否精确、批评是否公平。

Method: 采用AI辅助的多源文献综述方法，结合学术文献和灰色文献，综合从业者的认可和批评。使用ChatGPT进行深度研究，在持续人工监督下进行，并通过质量保证策略确保透明度和可靠性。同时邀请四位独立专家小组评估认可声明的精确性和批评的公平性。

Result: 从业者认可强调ISTQB认证的职业益处、改善沟通和共享词汇表；批评集中在理论内容过多、在敏捷和自动化密集环境中相关性有限、对实际测试技能支持不足。专家评审确认许多认可声明是精确的，而多项批评反映了测试实践中的更广泛张力，包括不同测试思想流派的对比。

Conclusion: ISTQB认证提供可识别的职业和沟通价值，但在实践效用方面仍存在争议。通过从业者声音与专家验证的三角验证，本研究提供了基于证据的ISTQB优势和局限反思。AI辅助的多源文献综述也展示了生成式AI工具如何在严格人工监督下支持系统证据合成。

Abstract: Objective: This study investigates the perceived value and critique of ISTQB certifications, the most widely recognized testing qualifications worldwide. While the certifications aim to standardize the software testing body of knowledge, debates persist about their practical relevance and impact. Our objective was to systematically capture practitioner perspectives and assess the precision of endorsements and fairness of criticisms through expert review. Method: We conducted an AI-assisted Multivocal Literature Review (MLR), combining academic and grey literature to synthesize practitioner endorsements (RQ1) and criticisms (RQ2). ChatGPT's deep research capability was employed under continuous human oversight, with QA strategies ensuring transparency and reliability. As another analysis, we asked a panel of four independent experts to evaluate the precision of endorsements and fairness of criticisms. Results: Practitioner endorsements emphasized career benefits, improved communication, and a shared vocabulary as the main values of ISTQB certifications. Criticisms focused on excessive theoretical content, limited relevance in agile and automation-intensive contexts, and weak support for real testing skills. Expert review confirmed that while many endorsements were precise, several criticisms reflected broader tensions in the discipline, including contrasting schools of thought in testing practice. Conclusions: ISTQB certifications provide recognizable career and communication value but remain contested in terms of practical utility. By triangulating practitioner voices with expert validation, this study delivers an evidence-based reflection on the strengths and weaknesses of ISTQB in shaping the software testing body of knowledge. The AI-assisted MLR also demonstrates how GenAI tools can support systematic evidence synthesis when coupled with rigorous human oversight.

</details>


### [878] [LLM-Augmented Release Intelligence: Automated Change Summarization and Impact Analysis in Cloud-Native CI/CD Pipelines](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14619)
*Happy Bhati*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出AI增强的发布智能框架，自动收集提交、生成结构化LLM摘要、分析任务依赖，为云原生软件交付平台提供自动化发布通信


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 云原生软件交付平台中，代码在不同环境间（开发→测试→生产）的发布过程涉及复杂的多阶段流水线，手动准备发布通信缓慢、不一致且容易出错，特别是当单个发布包含多个作者的大量流水线任务贡献时

Method: 结合三种能力：1) 自动提交收集与语义过滤，筛选实质性变更；2) 结构化大语言模型摘要，生成分类的、面向利益相关者的发布报告；3) 静态任务流水线依赖分析，映射修改任务到所有参与的流水线，量化变更影响范围

Result: 框架直接集成到CI/CD发布工作流中，作为GitHub Actions触发的后发布步骤，已在生产Kubernetes原生发布平台中实现，管理超过60个Tekton任务和20多个发布流水线

Conclusion: 通过具体案例和与SmartNote、VerLog等工具的比较，讨论了内部发布通信与面向用户发布说明的差异，并识别了LLM驱动发布工程面临的开放挑战

Abstract: Cloud-native software delivery platforms orchestrate releases through complex, multi-stage pipelines composed of dozens of independently versioned tasks. When code is promoted between environments -- development to staging, staging to production -- engineering teams need timely, accurate communication about what changed and what downstream components are affected. Manual preparation of such release communication is slow, inconsistent, and particularly error-prone in repositories where a single promotion may bundle contributions from many authors across numerous pipeline tasks. We present a framework for AI-augmented release intelligence that combines three capabilities: (1) automated commit collection with semantic filtering to surface substantive changes while suppressing routine maintenance, (2) structured large language model summarization that produces categorized, stakeholder-oriented promotion reports, and (3) static task-pipeline dependency analysis that maps modified tasks to every pipeline they participate in, quantifying the blast radius of each change. The framework is integrated directly into the CI/CD promotion workflow and operates as a post-promotion step triggered by GitHub Actions. We describe the architecture and implementation within a production Kubernetes-native release platform that manages over sixty Tekton tasks across more than twenty release pipelines. Through concrete walkthrough examples and qualitative comparison with recent tools such as SmartNote and VerLog, we discuss the distinctive requirements of internal promotion communication versus user-facing release notes and identify open challenges for LLM-driven release engineering.

</details>


### [879] [Beyond Local Code Optimization: Multi-Agent Reasoning for Software System Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14703)
*Huiyun Peng,Parth Vinod Patil,Antonio Zhong Qiu,George K. Thiruvathukal,James C. Davis*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出多智能体框架进行微服务全系统优化，通过整合控制流、数据流与架构依赖信号，实现跨组件性能推理，相比传统局部优化方法取得显著性能提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于大语言模型和AI代理的软件性能优化方法主要依赖局部、语法驱动的代码转换，缺乏对程序行为和全系统性能交互的推理能力。现代软件由微服务、数据库和共享基础设施等交互组件构成，需要超越单个函数或文件的程序结构和系统架构层面的推理。

Method: 提出多智能体框架，整合控制流和数据流表示与架构及跨组件依赖信号，支持系统级性能推理。系统分解为协调的智能体角色：总结、分析、优化和验证，协作识别跨领域瓶颈并构建跨越软件栈的多步骤优化策略。

Result: 在微服务系统上进行了概念验证，实现了吞吐量36.58%的提升和平均响应时间27.81%的降低，证明了所提框架的有效性。

Conclusion: 该研究展示了全系统优化在微服务环境中的可行性，通过多智能体框架整合系统级表示和依赖信号，能够有效识别跨组件瓶颈并实施协调优化策略，为现代分布式系统的性能优化提供了新途径。

Abstract: Large language models and AI agents have recently shown promise in automating software performance optimization, but existing approaches predominantly rely on local, syntax-driven code transformations. This limits their ability to reason about program behavior and capture whole system performance interactions. As modern software increasingly comprises interacting components - such as microservices, databases, and shared infrastructure - effective code optimization requires reasoning about program structure and system architecture beyond individual functions or files.
  This paper explores the feasibility of whole system optimization for microservices. We introduce a multi-agent framework that integrates control-flow and data-flow representations with architectural and cross-component dependency signals to support system-level performance reasoning. The proposed system is decomposed into coordinated agent roles - summarization, analysis, optimization, and verification - that collaboratively identify cross-cutting bottlenecks and construct multi-step optimization strategies spanning the software stack. We present a proof-of-concept on a microservice-based system that illustrates the effectiveness of our proposed framework, achieving a 36.58% improvement in throughput and a 27.81% reduction in average response time.

</details>


### [880] [SimCert: Probabilistic Certification for Behavioral Similarity in Deep Neural Network Compression](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14818)
*Jingyang Li,Fu Song,Guoqiang Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SimCert：一个概率性认证框架，用于验证压缩神经网络的相似性，提供可调整置信度的定量安全保证


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在资源受限的嵌入式系统上部署DNN需要量化、剪枝等压缩技术，但确保压缩模型保持原始设计的行为保真度是安全关键系统设计流程中的关键挑战。现有验证方法缺乏可扩展性或无法处理剪枝引入的架构异质性。

Method: 提出SimCert概率认证框架，包含：1) 支持量化和剪枝的双网络符号传播方法；2) 使用Bernstein不等式的方差感知边界技术来收紧安全证书；3) 自动化验证工具链。

Result: 在ACAS Xu和计算机视觉基准测试上的实验结果表明，SimCert优于最先进的基线方法。

Conclusion: SimCert为压缩神经网络的行为相似性验证提供了一个可扩展的概率认证框架，能够处理架构异质性并提供定量安全保证。

Abstract: Deploying Deep Neural Networks (DNNs) on resource-constrained embedded systems requires aggressive model compression techniques like quantization and pruning. However, ensuring that the compressed model preserves the behavioral fidelity of the original design is a critical challenge in the safety-critical system design flow. Existing verification methods often lack scalability or fail to handle the architectural heterogeneity introduced by pruning. In this work, we propose SimCert, a probabilistic certification framework for verifying the behavioral similarity of compressed neural networks. Unlike worst-case analysis, SimCert provides quantitative safety guarantees with adjustable confidence levels. Our framework features: (1) A dual-network symbolic propagation method supporting both quantization and pruning; (2) A variance-aware bounding technique using Bernstein's inequality to tighten safety certificates; and (3) An automated verification toolchain. Experimental results on ACAS Xu and computer vision benchmarks demonstrate that SimCert outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

</details>


### [881] [Counterexample Guided Branching via Directional Relaxation Analysis in Complete Neural Network Verification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14823)
*Jingyang Li,Fu Song,Guoqiang Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出DRG-BaB框架，将分支定界重构为数据流CEGAR循环，利用方向松弛间隙启发式优先分支对抽象域中导致验证失败的神经元，显著减少搜索树大小和验证时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度神经网络虽然性能优异但易受对抗扰动攻击，需要形式化验证以确保安全关键部署。当前数据流验证器采用盲目的分支定界细化过程，依赖静态启发式方法，未能利用验证失败的具体诊断信息。

Method: 提出DRG-BaB框架，将分支定界重构为数据流CEGAR循环，其中虚假反例作为局部抽象错误的精确见证。引入方向松弛间隙启发式，优先分支在抽象域中主动导致证伪的神经元。从线性边界直接推导闭式虚假反例，将通用搜索转化为针对性细化。

Result: 在高维基准测试上的实验表明，该方法相比现有基线显著减少了搜索树大小和验证时间。

Conclusion: 通过将分支定界重新构想为数据流CEGAR循环，并利用方向松弛间隙启发式进行针对性细化，可以显著提高神经网络验证的效率。

Abstract: Deep Neural Networks demonstrate exceptional performance but remain vulnerable to adversarial perturbations, necessitating formal verification for safety-critical deployment. To address the computational complexity of this task, researchers often employ abstraction-refinement techniques that iteratively tighten an over-approximated model. While structural methods utilize Counterexample-Guided Abstraction Refine- ment, state-of-the-art dataflow verifiers typically rely on Branch-and-Bound to refine numerical convex relaxations. However, current dataflow approaches operate with blind refinement processes that rely on static heuristics and fail to leverage specific diagnostic information from verification failures. In this work, we argue that Branch-and-Bound should be reformulated as a Dataflow CEGAR loop where the spurious counterexample serves as a precise witness to local abstraction errors. We propose DRG-BaB, a framework that introduces the Directional Relaxation Gap heuristic to prioritize branching on neurons actively contributing to falsification in the abstract domain. By deriving a closed-form spurious counterexample directly from linear bounds, our method transforms generic search into targeted refinement. Experiments on high-dimensional benchmarks demonstrate that this approach significantly reduces search tree size and verification time compared to established baselines.

</details>


### [882] [PCodeTrans: Translate Decompiled Pseudocode to Compilable and Executable Equivalent](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14855)
*Yuxin Cui,Zeyu Gao,Shuxian He,Siliang Qin,Chao Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: PCodeTrans是一个反馈驱动的反编译框架，通过动态验证确保反编译代码的可重编译性和运行时正确性，显著优于现有方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统反编译工具注重人类可读性而非可重编译性和运行时正确性，LLM方法易产生语义幻觉，无法解决实际运行时错误。对于软件现代化和漏洞修复等关键任务，恢复的代码必须能编译并复制原始二进制行为。

Method: 提取最小但连贯的上下文保证可重编译性，使用原位可替换引擎将编译函数热交换到未修改的二进制中，通过细粒度差异追踪生成运行时反馈，迭代指导LLM修复语义差异。

Result: 在Coreutils和Binutils上，PCodeTrans修复Hex-Rays原始输出后达到100%函数级可编译性，测试验证的行为一致性分别为99.55%和99.89%，解决了官方测试套件暴露的76.56%和79.74%逻辑错误。即使在完全剥离的二进制上，仍保持超过96%的行为一致性。

Conclusion: PCodeTrans显著优于所有现有基线，为可靠地将反编译伪代码转换为可编译和可执行的等价物开辟了实用路径。

Abstract: Decompilation is foundational to binary analysis, yet conventional tools prioritize human readability over strict recompilability and verifiable runtime correctness. While recent LLM-based approaches attempt to refine decompiled pseudocode, they typically either optimize solely for readability or rely on static analysis for evaluation. This makes them prone to "semantic hallucinations" that compromise accuracy and fail to resolve actual runtime failures. For critical tasks like software modernization and vulnerability remediation, recovered code must not only compile but replicate the original binary's behavior. We present PCodeTrans, a feedback-driven framework that bridges the gap between decompilation, recompilation, and rigorous function-level dynamic validation. After extracting a minimal yet coherent context to guarantee recompilability, PCodeTrans employs an in situ substitutable engine to hot-swap the compiled function directly into the unmodified binary, natively preserving its authentic execution context and global dependencies. Guided by fine-grained differential tracing, PCodeTrans generates precise runtime feedback to iteratively guide an LLM in repairing semantic discrepancies. Evaluated on Coreutils and Binutils, PCodeTrans achieves unprecedented recovery performance when rectifying raw Hex-Rays outputs, attaining 100% function-level compilability on unstripped binaries alongside 99.55% and 99.89% test-validated behavioral consistency, respectively. In doing so, it resolves 76.56% and 79.74% of logic errors exposed by official test suites. Exhibiting exceptional resilience, PCodeTrans maintains over 96% behavioral consistency even on fully stripped binaries. By significantly outperforming all existing baselines, PCodeTrans paves a practical path to reliably translate decompiled pseudocode into compilable and executable equivalents.

</details>


### [883] [TriFusion-LLM: Prior-Guided Multimodal Fusion with LLM Arbitration for Fine-grained Code Clone Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15004)
*Mengdi Li,Yuming Liu,He Wang,Zifeng Xu,Yuqing Zhang*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Full Model是一个多模态融合框架，将启发式相似性先验、AST结构信号和CodeBERT语义嵌入结合，用于细粒度代码克隆检测，在BigCloneBench上大幅提升性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有预训练模型大多将代码克隆检测简化为二元分类，忽略了克隆类型的异质性和BigCloneBench中的七种细粒度类别，需要更精细的检测方法。

Method: 提出多模态融合框架，联合集成经典机器学习的启发式相似性先验、抽象语法树的结构信号和CodeBERT的深度语义嵌入，并使用LLM对高不确定性样本进行选择性仲裁。

Result: 在七类BigCloneBench基准测试中，Macro-F1从0.695提升到0.875；仅对约0.2%的高不确定性样本进行LLM仲裁，可获得额外的0.3绝对Macro-F1增益。

Conclusion: Full Model实现了细粒度代码克隆检测的性能与成本的有效权衡，为大规模工业部署提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: Code clone detection (CCD) supports software maintenance, refactoring, and security analysis. Although pre-trained models capture code semantics, most work reduces CCD to binary classification, overlooking the heterogeneity of clone types and the seven fine-grained categories in BigCloneBench. We present Full Model, a multimodal fusion framework that jointly integrates heuristic similarity priors from classical machine learning, structural signals from abstract syntax trees (ASTs), and deep semantic embeddings from CodeBERT into a single predictor. By fusing structural, statistical, and semantic representations, Full Model improves discrimination among fine-grained clone types while keeping inference cost practical. On the seven-class BigCloneBench benchmark, Full Model raises Macro-F1 from 0.695 to 0.875. Ablation studies show that using the primary model's probability distribution as a prior to guide selective arbitration by a large language model (LLM) substantially outperforms blind reclassification; arbitrating only ~0.2% of high-uncertainty samples yields an additional 0.3 absolute Macro-F1 gain. Overall, Full Model achieves an effective performance-cost trade-off for fine-grained CCD and offers a practical solution for large-scale industrial deployment.

</details>


### [884] [Describing Agentic AI Systems with C4: Lessons from Industry Projects](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15021)
*Andreas Rausch,Stefan Wittek*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种面向智能体AI系统的文档化系统，包含风格导向的建模词汇、分层描述技术和工业案例，以支持这类系统的透明、可维护架构文档。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 不同领域有不同的架构风格和文档实践，智能体AI系统具有独特的协作风格（智能体通过交换工件、调用外部工具、协调交互模式等协作）。随着这些系统发展为长期工业解决方案，需要专门的文档化方法来捕获这些风格定义的问题，而不是依赖临时代码草图或管道图。

Method: 1) 提供风格导向的建模词汇和一组视图（智能体、工件、工具及其协调模式）；2) 提出与C4对齐的分层描述技术，在不同抽象层次上组织这些视图；3) 通过工业项目经验和案例展示方法应用。

Result: 开发了一个专门针对智能体AI系统风格的文档化系统，包含建模词汇、视图集和分层描述技术，通过工业案例验证了该方法能产生透明、可维护的架构文档，支持持续演化。

Conclusion: 智能体AI系统需要专门的文档化方法来捕获其独特的协作风格。提出的文档化系统通过风格导向的建模词汇、分层视图和工业实践，为这类系统提供了有效的架构文档支持，有助于系统的透明性、可维护性和持续演化。

Abstract: Different domains foster different architectural styles -- and thus different documentation practices (e.g., state-based models for behavioral control vs. ER-style models for information structures). Agentic AI systems exhibit another characteristic style: specialized agents collaborate by exchanging artifacts, invoking external tools, and coordinating via recurring interaction patterns and quality gates. As these systems evolve into long-lived industrial solutions, documentation must capture these style-defining concerns rather than relying on ad-hoc code sketches or pipeline drawings. This paper reports industrial experience from joint projects and derives a documentation systematics tailored to this style. Concretely, we provide (i) a style-oriented modeling vocabulary and a small set of views for agents, artifacts, tools, and their coordination patterns, (ii) a hierarchical description technique aligned with C4 to structure these views across abstraction levels, and (iii) industrial examples with lessons learned that demonstrate how the approach yields transparent, maintainable architecture documentation supporting sustained evolution.

</details>


### [885] [Beyond Monolithic Models: Symbolic Seams for Composable Neuro-Symbolic Architectures](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15087)
*Nicolas Schuler,Vincenzo Scotti,Raffaela Mirandola*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 论文提出将可组合性作为AI系统设计原则，引入符号接缝概念，将AI视为可组合的神经符号架构而非单体模型


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前AI系统常采用单体模型设计，将感知、推理和决策耦合在一起，这与软件架构原则相冲突。大语言模型虽然规模大但缺乏透明性和适应性。需要新的设计方法来解决这些问题。

Method: 提出可组合性原则，引入"符号接缝"概念：在系统架构中设置明确的断点，包含可检查的类型化边界对象、版本化约束束和决策轨迹。通过接缝实现神经符号组合设计，结合学习组件的适应性和符号约束的可验证性。

Result: 通过符号接缝实现了可组合的神经符号架构，将AI系统视为可互换部件的组合而非不可分割的整体，结合了神经和符号方法的优势。

Conclusion: 将可组合性作为指导原则，将AI视为"活的架构"而非固定制品，能够创建可扩展、透明且支持原则性演进的智能系统，为AI系统设计提供了新方向。

Abstract: Current Artificial Intelligence (AI) systems are frequently built around monolithic models that entangle perception, reasoning, and decision-making, a design that often conflicts with established software architecture principles. Large Language Models (LLMs) amplify this tendency, offering scale but limited transparency and adaptability. To address this, we argue for composability as a guiding principle that treats AI as a living architecture rather than a fixed artifact. We introduce symbolic seams: explicit architectural breakpoints where a system commits to inspectable, typed boundary objects, versioned constraint bundles, and decision traces. We describe how seams enable a composable neuro-symbolic design that combines the data-driven adaptability of learned components with the verifiability of explicit symbolic constraints -- combining strengths neither paradigm achieves alone. By treating AI systems as assemblies of interchangeable parts rather than indivisible wholes, we outline a direction for intelligent systems that are extensible, transparent, and amenable to principled evolution.

</details>


### [886] [To See is Not to Master: Teaching LLMs to Use Private Libraries for Code Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15159)
*Yitong Zhang,Chengze Li,Ruize Chen,Guowei Yang,Xiaoran Jia,Yijie Ren,Jia Li*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: PriCoder通过自动合成数据教LLMs调用私有库API，使用图构建和演化/剪枝操作提升数据多样性和质量，在私有库代码生成任务上显著提升性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法主要依赖检索私有库API文档并在推理时注入相关知识，但即使给定准确知识，LLMs仍难以有效调用私有库API，需要更好的解决方案

Method: PriCoder通过自动合成数据教LLMs调用私有库API，将私有库数据合成建模为图构建，交替使用两个图操作符：1)渐进图演化提升数据多样性，2)多维图剪枝通过严格过滤提升数据质量

Result: 在三个主流LLMs上的实验显示，PriCoder显著提升私有库导向的代码生成，在许多设置中pass@1提升超过20%，同时对通用代码生成能力影响极小

Conclusion: PriCoder通过自动数据合成有效解决了LLMs在私有库API调用方面的局限性，建立了两个新基准，为私有库代码生成提供了有效解决方案

Abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) have shown strong potential for code generation, yet they remain limited in private-library-oriented code generation, where the goal is to generate code using APIs from private libraries. Existing approaches mainly rely on retrieving private-library API documentation and injecting relevant knowledge into the context at inference time. However, our study shows that this is insufficient: even given accurate required knowledge, LLMs still struggle to invoke private-library APIs effectively.
  To address this limitation, we propose PriCoder, an approach that teaches LLMs to invoke private-library APIs through automatically synthesized data. Specifically, PriCoder models private-library data synthesis as the construction of a graph, and alternates between two graph operators: (1) Progressive Graph Evolution, which improves data diversity by progressively synthesizing more diverse training samples from basic ones, and (2) Multidimensional Graph Pruning, which improves data quality through a rigorous filtering pipeline. To support rigorous evaluation, we construct two new benchmarks based on recently released libraries that are unfamiliar to the tested models. Experiments on three mainstream LLMs show that PriCoder substantially improves private-library-oriented code generation, yielding gains of over 20% in pass@1 in many settings, while causing negligible impact on general code generation capability. Our code and benchmarks are publicly available at https://github.com/contact-eniacode/PriCoder.

</details>


### [887] [The Impact of AI-Assisted Development on Software Security: A Study of Gemini and Developer Experience](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15298)
*Nadine Jost,Benjamin Berens,Manuel Karl,Stefan Albert Horstmann,Martin Johns,Alena Naiakshina*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 研究探讨AI编程工具（Gemini免费版与付费版）对代码安全性的影响，发现编程经验比AI工具使用更能提升代码安全性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI编程工具的普及，需要了解开发者编程经验、安全经验以及AI工具类型（免费vs付费）如何影响最终软件的安全性

Method: 对159名软件开发者进行定量编程研究，分配安全相关编程任务，分为三组：不使用AI工具、使用Gemini免费版、使用Gemini付费版

Result: 使用Gemini（免费或付费版）对代码安全性没有显著差异；编程经验显著提高代码安全性，且不能被Gemini完全替代

Conclusion: 编程经验在确保代码安全性方面比AI工具使用更为关键，AI工具不能完全替代人类开发者的专业经验

Abstract: The ongoing shortage of skilled developers, particularly in security-critical software development, has led organizations to increasingly adopt AI-powered development tools to boost productivity and reduce reliance on limited human expertise. These tools, often based on large language models, aim to automate routine tasks and make secure software development more accessible and efficient. However, it remains unclear how developers' general programming and security-specific experience, and the type of AI tool used (free vs. paid) affect the security of the resulting software. Therefore, we conducted a quantitative programming study with software developers (n=159) exploring the impact of Google's AI tool Gemini on code security. Participants were assigned a security-related programming task using either no AI tools, the free version, or the paid version of Gemini. While we did not observe significant differences between using Gemini in terms of secure software development, programming experience significantly improved code security and cannot be fully substituted by Gemini.

</details>


### [888] [To be FAIR or RIGHT? Methodological [R]esearch [I]ntegrity [G]iven [H]uman-facing [T]echnologies using the example of Learning Technologies](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15366)
*Julian Dehne*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 提出了RIGHT框架来评估研究软件工程的质量，特别关注有效性方面，填补了现有框架的空白


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有研究软件工程质量评估主要关注可靠性和FAIR原则，缺乏对有效性方面的系统评估框架

Method: 采用理论转移和过程建模方法，基于模拟研究、设计研究、软件工程和实证社会科学等现有模型构建RIGHT框架

Result: 开发了RIGHT框架，并通过学习技术领域的两个案例研究展示了该框架在面向人类的研究软件工程中的实际应用价值

Conclusion: RIGHT框架填补了研究软件工程质量评估中有效性方面的空白，为面向人类的研究软件工程提供了实用的评估工具

Abstract: Quality assessment of Research Software Engineering (RSE) plays an important role in all scientific fields. From the canonical three criteria (reliability, validity, and
  objectivity) previous research has focussed on reliability and the FAIR principles. The RIGHT framework is introduced to fill the gap of existing
  frameworks for the validity aspect. The framework is constructed using the methods of theory transfer and process modelling. It is based on existing models of
  simulation research, design-based research, software engineering and empirical social sciences. The paper concludes with two case studies drawn from the field of learning technologies to illustrate the practical relevance
  of the framework for human-facing RSE.

</details>


### [889] [SKILLS: Structured Knowledge Injection for LLM-Driven Telecommunications Operations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15372)
*Ivo Brett*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SKILLS框架评估LLM在电信运营工作流中的表现，结果显示结构化领域指导能显著提升模型性能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 电信运营商加速采用AI自动化时，需要了解通用LLM能否可靠执行电信运营工作流，还是需要结构化领域指导

Method: 引入SKILLS基准框架，包含37个电信运营场景，覆盖8个TM Forum Open API域，使用实时模拟API服务器和生产代表性数据，评估两种条件：基线（通用代理）和带技能（增强SKILL.md文档）

Result: 所有模型在带技能条件下均有显著提升：MiniMax M2.5最佳（81.1%，+13.5pp），Nemotron 120B（78.4%，+18.9pp），GLM-5 Turbo（78.4%，+5.4pp），Seed 2.0 Lite（75.7%，+18.9pp）

Conclusion: 结构化领域指导对LLM在电信运营工作流中的可靠执行至关重要，SKILLS框架为评估和提升LLM在专业领域的性能提供了有效方法

Abstract: As telecommunications operators accelerate adoption of AI-enabled automation, a practical question remains unresolved: can general-purpose large language model (LLM) agents reliably execute telecom operations workflows through real API interfaces, or do they require structured domain guidance? We introduce SKILLS (Structured Knowledge Injection for LLM-driven Service Lifecycle operations), a benchmark framework comprising 37 telecom operations scenarios spanning 8 TM Forum Open API domains (TMF620, TMF621, TMF622, TMF628, TMF629, TMF637, TMF639, TMF724). Each scenario is grounded in live mock API servers with seeded production-representative data, MCP tool interfaces, and deterministic evaluation rubrics combining response content checks, tool-call verification, and database state assertions. We evaluate open-weight models under two conditions: baseline (generic agent with tool access but no domain guidance) and with-skill (agent augmented with a portable SKILL.md document encoding workflow logic, API patterns, and business rules). Results across 5 open-weight model conditions and 185 scenario-runs show consistent skill lift across all models. MiniMax M2.5 leads (81.1% with-skill, +13.5pp), followed by Nemotron 120B (78.4%, +18.9pp), GLM-5 Turbo (78.4%, +5.4pp), and Seed 2.0 Lite (75.7%, +18.9pp).

</details>


### [890] [Formalizing and validating properties in Asmeta with Large Language Models (Extended Abstract)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15375)
*Andrea Bombarda,Silvia Bonfanti,Angelo Gargantini,Nico Pellegrinelli*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: LLM集成到Asmeta框架中，辅助用户定义、形式化、解释和验证时序逻辑属性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 用户在使用基于模型的开发框架时，将非正式需求转化为形式化规范通常具有挑战性，特别是时序逻辑属性的编写

Method: 提出一个工作流程，其中基于LLM的智能体利用Asmeta规范和模型检查器的反馈，支持时序属性的定义、形式化、解释和验证活动

Result: 通过代表性示例展示了这种集成的可行性和潜在益处，作为概念验证

Conclusion: LLM与Asmeta框架的集成能够有效辅助用户处理时序逻辑属性，展示了人工智能在形式化方法中的实用价值

Abstract: Writing temporal logic properties is often a challenging task for users of model-based development frameworks, particularly when translating informal requirements into formal specifications. In this paper, we explore the idea of integrating Large Language Models (LLMs) into the Asmeta framework to assist users during the definition, formalization, explanation, and validation of temporal properties. We present a workflow in which an LLM-based agent supports these activities by leveraging the Asmeta specification and the feedback produced by the model checker. This work serves as a proof of concept that illustrates the feasibility and potential benefits of such an integration through representative examples.

</details>


### [891] [SWE-Skills-Bench: Do Agent Skills Actually Help in Real-World Software Engineering?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15401)
*Tingxu Han,Yi Zhang,Wei Song,Chunrong Fang,Zhenyu Chen,Youcheng Sun,Lijie Hu*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: SWE-Skills-Bench研究发现，在软件工程任务中注入代理技能的实际效用有限，49个技能中39个零提升，平均仅+1.2%，只有7个专业技能有显著改进。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管代理技能在推理时注入结构化程序知识包被广泛用于增强LLM代理的软件工程能力，但其在端到端开发环境中的实际效用尚不明确，需要系统评估。

Method: 构建SWE-Skills-Bench基准测试，包含49个公共SWE技能、固定提交的GitHub仓库和明确验收标准的需求文档，共565个任务实例。采用确定性验证框架，将验收标准映射到基于执行的测试，进行有/无技能注入的对照配对评估。

Result: 技能注入的益处远低于预期：39/49技能零通过率提升，平均增益仅+1.2%。token开销从适度节省到451%增加不等。只有7个专业技能有显著提升（最高+30%），3个因版本不匹配导致性能下降（最高-10%）。

Conclusion: 代理技能是一种狭窄的干预手段，其效用高度依赖于领域匹配度、抽象层次和上下文兼容性。SWE-Skills-Bench为评估软件工程代理中的技能设计、选择和部署提供了测试平台。

Abstract: Agent skills, structured procedural knowledge packages injected at inference time, are increasingly used to augment LLM agents on software engineering tasks. However, their real utility in end-to-end development settings remains unclear. We present SWE-Skills-Bench, the first requirement-driven benchmark that isolates the marginal utility of agent skills in real-world software engineering (SWE). It pairs 49 public SWE skills with authentic GitHub repositories pinned at fixed commits and requirement documents with explicit acceptance criteria, yielding approximately 565 task instances across six SWE subdomains. We introduce a deterministic verification framework that maps each task's acceptance criteria to execution-based tests, enabling controlled paired evaluation with and without the skill. Our results show that skill injection benefits are far more limited than rapid adoption suggests: 39 of 49 skills yield zero pass-rate improvement, and the average gain is only +1.2%. Token overhead varies from modest savings to a 451% increase while pass rates remain unchanged. Only seven specialized skills produce meaningful gains (up to +30%), while three degrade performance (up to -10%) due to version-mismatched guidance conflicting with project context. These findings suggest that agent skills are a narrow intervention whose utility depends strongly on domain fit, abstraction level, and contextual compatibility. SWE-Skills-Bench provides a testbed for evaluating the design, selection, and deployment of skills in software engineering agents. SWE-Skills-Bench is available at https://github.com/GeniusHTX/SWE-Skills-Bench.

</details>


### [892] [Formalisms for Robotic Mission Specification and Execution: A Comparative Analysis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15427)
*Gianluca Filippone,Sara Pettinari,Patrizio Pelliccione*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 本文系统分析了四种机器人任务规范形式化方法（行为树、状态机、分层任务网络、业务流程模型与符号）在机器人任务规范中的适用性，为从业者和研究者选择合适的方法提供指导。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着机器人系统日益复杂并在动态环境中运行，需要结构化、表达力强且可扩展的任务规范方法。目前缺乏机器人任务规范的标准形式化方法，现有各种方法各有优缺点，需要系统分析比较以指导实践选择。

Method: 对四种形式化方法（行为树、状态机、分层任务网络、业务流程模型与符号）进行系统分析，重点关注任务级描述而非机器人软件开发。分析其底层控制结构和任务概念，评估其在建模真实世界任务时的表达能力和局限性，评估可用工具支持程度，并通过专家验证研究结果。

Result: 通过比较分析四种形式化方法，揭示了它们在机器人系统建模中的适用性、优势和不足。研究结果为从业者和研究者选择合适的方法提供了依据，有助于设计稳健且适应性强的单机器人或多机器人任务。

Conclusion: 本文提供了四种主流机器人任务规范形式化方法的系统性比较分析，填补了该领域缺乏标准评估框架的空白。研究结果有助于指导机器人系统设计者根据具体需求选择最合适的任务建模方法，推动机器人任务规范实践的发展。

Abstract: Robots are increasingly deployed across diverse domains and designed for multi-purpose operation. As robotic systems grow in complexity and operate in dynamic environments, the need for structured, expressive, and scalable mission-specification approaches becomes critical, with mission specifications often defined in the field by domain experts rather than robotics specialists. However, there is no standard or widely accepted formalism for specifying missions in single- or multi-robot systems. A variety of formalisms, such as Behavior Trees, State Machines, Hierarchical Task Networks, and Business Process Model and Notation, have been adopted in robotics to varying degrees, each providing different levels of abstraction, expressiveness, and support for integration with human workflows and external devices.
  This paper presents a systematic analysis of these four formalisms with respect to their suitability for robot mission specification. Our study focuses on mission-level descriptions rather than robot software development. We analyze their underlying control structures and mission concepts, evaluate their expressiveness and limitations in modeling real-world missions, and assess the extent of available tool support. By comparing the formalisms and validating our findings with experts, we provide insights into their applicability, strengths, and shortcomings in robotic system modeling. The results aim to support practitioners and researchers in selecting appropriate modeling approaches for designing robust and adaptable robot and multi-robot missions.

</details>


### [893] [Probabilistic Model Checking Taken by Storm](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15559)
*Matthias Volk,Linus Heck,Sebastian Junges,Joost-Pieter Katoen,Tim Quatmann*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: 关于使用Storm模型检查器进行概率模型检查的实践教程，重点介绍马尔可夫决策过程（MDP）的基本工作流程和高级功能


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: Storm作为一款已有十年历史的模型检查器，在性能和丰富的Python生态系统方面表现出色，易于集成到各种工作流程中。本教程旨在为研究人员和从业者提供使用Storm进行概率模型检查的实践指导。

Method: 教程采用实践导向的方法，从Python建模开始，展示完整的模型检查工作流程。包括MDP建模、使用各种属性进行模型检查、策略提取，并扩展到支持区间MDP和部分可观察MDP（POMDP）等不确定性类型，以及如何在现有数据结构上快速实现简单算法。

Result: 教程展示了Storm模型检查器在概率模型检查方面的强大功能，包括完整的MDP分析工作流程、对不确定性模型的支持，以及通过Python生态系统实现的灵活性和易用性。

Conclusion: Storm是一个功能强大且易于使用的概率模型检查工具，特别适合处理MDP和相关不确定性模型。其Python生态系统和性能优势使其成为研究和实际应用的理想选择。

Abstract: This tutorial paper presents a hands-on perspective on probabilistic model checking with the Storm model checker. Storm is a decade-old model checker that excels in performance and a rich Python-based ecosystem, which makes it easy to integrate in various workflows. This tutorial focuses on Markov decision processes (MDP), which are popular in a variety of fields. It demonstrates the basic workflow, from Python-based modeling, model checking with a variety of properties, to the extraction of policies. Further, it showcases the support for recent topics that focus on different types of uncertainty, such as interval MDP and POMDP, and the ability to quickly implement simple algorithms on top of existing data structures.

</details>


### [894] [Lore: Repurposing Git Commit Messages as a Structured Knowledge Protocol for AI Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15566)
*Ivan Stetsenko*

Main category: cs.SE

TL;DR: Lore协议通过重构git提交消息来捕获代码决策背后的推理过程，解决AI编码代理导致的机构知识流失问题


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着AI编码代理成为源代码的主要生产者和消费者，软件行业面临机构知识加速流失的问题。每次提交只捕获代码差异，却丢弃了决策背后的推理过程（约束条件、被拒绝的替代方案、前瞻性上下文等），作者称之为"决策阴影"。

Method: 提出Lore协议，使用原生git trailers将提交消息重构为自包含的决策记录，包含约束条件、被拒绝的替代方案、代理指令和验证元数据。该协议无需git以外的任何基础设施，可通过独立CLI工具查询，任何能够运行shell命令的代理都可以发现。

Result: 论文形式化了该协议，与五种竞争方法进行比较，针对最强反对意见进行了压力测试，并概述了实证验证路径。

Conclusion: Lore协议提供了一种轻量级解决方案，通过捕获代码决策背后的完整推理过程，帮助缓解AI时代软件行业面临的机构知识流失问题。

Abstract: As AI coding agents become both primary producers and consumers of source code, the software industry faces an accelerating loss of institutional knowledge. Each commit captures a code diff but discards the reasoning behind it - the constraints, rejected alternatives, and forward-looking context that shaped the decision. I term this discarded reasoning the Decision Shadow. This paper proposes Lore, a lightweight protocol that restructures commit messages - using native git trailers - into self-contained decision records carrying constraints, rejected alternatives, agent directives, and verification metadata. Lore requires no infrastructure beyond git, is queryable via a standalone CLI tool, and is discoverable by any agent capable of running shell commands. The paper formalizes the protocol, compares it against five competing approaches, stress-tests it against its strongest objections, and outlines an empirical validation path.

</details>


<div id='cs.NE'></div>

# cs.NE [[Back]](#toc)

### [895] [Bullet Trains: Parallelizing Training of Temporally Precise Spiking Neural Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13283)
*Todd Morrill,Christian Pehle,Anthony Zador*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 该论文提出了两种方法来解决事件驱动的脉冲神经网络（SNN）的实际训练挑战：1）使用并行关联扫描处理多个输入脉冲，实现高达44倍的加速；2）实现可微分的脉冲时间求解器，无需离散时间近似即可精确计算脉冲时间。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 连续时间、事件驱动的SNN严格基于脉冲事件运行，将脉冲时间和顺序视为表示而非时间离散化的产物。这种观点与生物计算、事件传感器和神经形态处理器的原生分辨率一致，同时使计算和内存随事件数量扩展。然而，两个挑战阻碍了实用的端到端可训练事件驱动SNN系统：1）精确的充电-放电-重置动态需要顺序处理输入脉冲；2）必须在没有时间分箱的情况下精确求解脉冲时间。

Method: 1）使用并行关联扫描同时消耗多个输入脉冲，在保持精确硬重置动态的同时实现高达44倍的加速；2）实现可微分的脉冲时间求解器，无需离散时间近似或限制性分析假设，即可计算达到机器精度的脉冲时间。

Result: 在GPU上使用四个事件数据集证明了训练SNN的可行性，并行关联扫描实现了高达44倍的速度提升，同时保持了精确的动态特性。

Conclusion: 该研究解决了事件驱动SNN系统端到端训练的两个关键挑战，通过并行处理和精确脉冲时间求解，为实用的连续时间SNN训练提供了可行的解决方案。

Abstract: Continuous-time, event-native spiking neural networks (SNNs) operate strictly on spike events, treating spike timing and ordering as the representation rather than an artifact of time discretization. This viewpoint aligns with biological computation and with the native resolution of event sensors and neuromorphic processors, while enabling compute and memory that scale with the number of events. However, two challenges hinder practical, end-to-end trainable event-based SNN systems: 1) exact charge--fire--reset dynamics impose inherently sequential processing of input spikes, and 2) precise spike times must be solved without time bins. We address both. First, we use parallel associative scans to consume multiple input spikes at once, yielding up to 44x speedups over sequential simulation while retaining exact hard-reset dynamics. Second, we implement differentiable spike-time solvers that compute spike times to machine precision without discrete-time approximations or restrictive analytic assumptions. We demonstrate the viability of training SNNs using our solutions on four event-based datasets on GPUs.

</details>


### [896] [Benchmarking the Energy Cost of Assurance in Neuromorphic Edge Robotics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13880)
*Sylvester Kaczmarek*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 本文量化了事件驱动神经形态系统中保证机制的能量成本，在BrainChip Akida处理器上测试HTD防御框架，证明神经形态稀疏性可实现可持续的高保证边缘自主性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在边缘机器人上部署可信人工智能需要在高度鲁棒性和能源可持续性之间做出困难权衡。传统对抗攻击防御机制通常带来显著计算开销，威胁到功率受限平台（如月球空间环境）的可行性。

Method: 在BrainChip Akida AKD1000处理器上对分层时间防御（HTD）框架进行基准测试，针对一系列对抗性时间攻击进行评估。利用事件驱动架构和波动门控可塑性机制。

Result: 系统将基于梯度的对抗成功率从82.1%降至18.7%，时间抖动成功率从75.8%降至25.1%，同时保持每次推理约45微焦耳的能量消耗。完全防御配置下动态功耗出现反直觉降低。

Conclusion: 神经形态稀疏性能够实现可持续和高保证的边缘自主性，事件驱动架构在鲁棒性和效率之间实现了优于传统深度学习防御的权衡。

Abstract: Deploying trustworthy artificial intelligence on edge robotics imposes a difficult trade-off between high-assurance robustness and energy sustainability. Traditional defense mechanisms against adversarial attacks typically incur significant computational overhead, threatening the viability of power-constrained platforms in environments such as cislunar space. This paper quantifies the energy cost of assurance in event-driven neuromorphic systems. We benchmark the Hierarchical Temporal Defense (HTD) framework on the BrainChip Akida AKD1000 processor against a suite of adversarial temporal attacks. We demonstrate that unlike traditional deep learning defenses which often degrade efficiency significantly with increased robustness, the event-driven nature of the proposed architecture achieves a superior trade-off. The system reduces gradient-based adversarial success rates from 82.1% to 18.7% and temporal jitter success rates from 75.8% to 25.1%, while maintaining an energy consumption of approximately 45 microjoules per inference. We report a counter-intuitive reduction in dynamic power consumption in the fully defended configuration, attributed to volatility-gated plasticity mechanisms that induce higher network sparsity. These results provide empirical evidence that neuromorphic sparsity enables sustainable and high-assurance edge autonomy.

</details>


### [897] [Equivalence of approximation by networks of single- and multi-spike neurons](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13478)
*Dominik Dold,Philipp Christian Petersen*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 单次放电与多次放电脉冲神经网络在近似能力上是等价的，只需线性增加神经元数量即可实现相同的近似性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有脉冲神经网络近似理论仅适用于单次放电神经元，这被认为是严重限制。本文旨在证明单次放电和多次放电神经元在近似能力上是等价的。

Method: 通过理论分析证明：对于包括常用的泄漏积分-发放模型在内的一大类脉冲神经元模型，任何适用于多次放电神经网络的近似界限，都存在一个仅需线性增加神经元数量的单次放电神经网络集合，能够达到相同的近似性能。

Result: 证明了单次放电和多次放电脉冲神经网络在一般机器学习任务的近似能力上是等价的。这意味着许多文献中针对单次放电神经网络的近似结果同样适用于多次放电情况。

Conclusion: 单次放电并非脉冲神经网络的限制因素，单次放电和多次放电神经网络在近似能力上是等价的，只需适当增加神经元数量即可实现相同的性能。

Abstract: In a spiking neural network, is it enough for each neuron to spike at most once? In recent work, approximation bounds for spiking neural networks have been derived, quantifying how well they can fit target functions. However, these results are only valid for neurons that spike at most once, which is commonly thought to be a strong limitation. Here, we show that the opposite is true for a large class of spiking neuron models, including the commonly used leaky integrate-and-fire model with subtractive reset: for every approximation bound that is valid for a set of multi-spike neural networks, there is an equivalent set of single-spike neural networks with only linearly more neurons (in the maximum number of spikes) for which the bound holds. The same is true for the reverse direction too, showing that regarding their approximation capabilities in general machine learning tasks, single-spike and multi-spike neural networks are equivalent. Consequently, many approximation results in the literature for single-spike neural networks also hold for the multi-spike case.

</details>


### [898] [MO-SAE:Multi-Objective Stacked Autoencoders Optimization for Edge Anomaly Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13895)
*Lizhao Zhang,Shengsong Kong,Tao Guo,Shaobo Li,Zhenzhou Ji*

Main category: cs.NE

TL;DR: 提出MO-SAE框架，通过多目标优化解决边缘异常检测中SAE模型的资源消耗问题，在保持性能的同时显著降低存储、功耗并提升推理速度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 堆叠自编码器(SAE)在边缘异常检测中应用广泛，但其资源密集特性与边缘设备资源受限、需要快速适应动态变化的现实需求存在矛盾。现有方法难以同时满足存储受限、低功耗、快速推理和高效模型更新等异构部署需求。

Method: 提出MO-SAE框架，将SAE优化建模为多目标优化问题，集成模型剪枝、多分支退出设计和矩阵近似技术，并采用多目标启发式算法平衡竞争目标。

Result: 在x86架构上，MO-SAE相比原始方法减少至少50%存储空间和功耗，提升至少28%运行效率，达到11.8%压缩率，同时保持应用性能。在ARM边缘设备上推理速度提升15%，支持云边协同异常检测系统高效部署。

Conclusion: MO-SAE通过系统级多目标优化，有效解决了边缘异常检测中SAE模型的资源效率问题，为资源受限的边缘设备提供了平衡性能与效率的解决方案，促进了云边协同异常检测系统的实际部署。

Abstract: Stacked AutoEncoders (SAE) have been widely adopted in edge anomaly detection scenarios. However, the resource-intensive nature of SAE can pose significant challenges for edge devices, which are typically resource-constrained and must adapt rapidly to dynamic and changing conditions. Optimizing SAE to meet the heterogeneous demands of real-world deployment scenarios, including high performance under constrained storage, low power consumption, fast inference, and efficient model updates, remains a substantial challenge. To address this, we propose an integrated optimization framework that jointly considers these critical factors to achieve balanced and adaptive system-level optimization. Specifically, we formulate SAE optimization for edge anomaly detection as a multi-objective optimization problem and propose MO-SAE (Multi-Objective Stacked AutoEncoders). The multiple objectives are addressed by integrating model clipping, multi-branch exit design, and a matrix approximation technique. In addition, a multi-objective heuristic algorithm is employed to effectively balance the competing objectives in SAE optimization. Our results demonstrate that the proposed MO-SAE delivers substantial improvements over the original approach. On the x86 architecture, it reduces storage space and power consumption by at least 50%, improves runtime efficiency by no less than 28%, and achieves an 11.8% compression rate, all while maintaining application performance. Furthermore, MO-SAE runs efficiently on edge devices with ARM architecture. Experimental results show a 15% improvement in inference speed, facilitating efficient deployment in cloud-edge collaborative anomaly detection systems.

</details>


<div id='cs.GT'></div>

# cs.GT [[Back]](#toc)

### [899] [Dynamic Wholesale Pricing under Censored-Demand Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13599)
*Michalis Deligiannis,Marco Scarsini,Xavier Venel*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 研究有限期动态批发价合约，双方只能观测销售而非真实需求，通过销售数据更新需求分布的后验信念，分析马尔可夫完美均衡


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究制造商和零售商在信息不对称（只能观测销售而非真实需求）情况下的动态定价问题，当零售商缺货时未满足需求不可观测，双方需通过销售数据共同更新对需求分布的信念

Method: 采用马尔可夫完美均衡分析框架，将公共信念状态作为状态变量，对于威布尔需求扩展了经典的缩放方法，对于指数需求使用简单的后向递归计算

Result: 对于威布尔需求证明了均衡存在性并将计算简化为标准化单参数递归；对于指数需求证明了均衡唯一性并可通过简单后向递归计算

Conclusion: 在只能观测销售而非真实需求的动态批发价合约中，通过公共信念状态建模的战略学习环境下，可以建立可计算的均衡框架，为信息不对称下的供应链决策提供理论支持

Abstract: We study a finite-horizon dynamic wholesale-price contract between a manufacturer and a retailer, both of whom observe only sales, rather than the true demand. When the retailer stocks out, unmet demand is unobserved, so both parties update a common posterior over the demand distribution from sales data. Each period, the manufacturer sets the wholesale price, the retailer chooses an order quantity, and the public belief state is updated. We characterize Markov perfect equilibria as functions of this public belief. Our main results are as follows: for Weibull demand, we extend the well-known scaling approach to this strategic learning setting, prove the existence of an equilibrium, and reduce computation to a standardized one-parameter recursion; for exponential demand, we show that the equilibrium is unique and computable via a simple backward recursion.

</details>


### [900] [Decision Aggregation under Quantal Response](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.13807)
*Zhihuan Huang,Yichong Xia,Yuqing Kong*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 多数投票在个体理性低于阈值时是最优的鲁棒聚合器，有界理性群体的集体决策可能超越完全理性个体，LLM的温度参数验证了这一理论


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究在个体存在有界理性和随机性的情况下，如何有效聚合专家决策，探索有界理性在集体智能中的潜在优势而非局限

Method: 采用量化响应模型刻画有界理性专家行为，在最小最大遗憾框架下分析信号聚合问题，使用LLM的温度参数作为量化响应的自然实现进行验证

Result: 当个体理性低于特定阈值时，多数投票是最优的鲁棒聚合器；有界理性群体可能超越完全理性个体，因为决策随机性编码了微弱但信息丰富的信号；适度随机的LLM输出聚合显著提升了复杂推理任务的准确性

Conclusion: 有界理性不应被视为局限，而是集体智能的潜在优势，决策随机性可以编码有价值的信息，为设计更有效的集体决策系统提供了新视角

Abstract: The effectiveness of collective decision-making is often challenged by the bounded rationality and inherent stochasticity of individual agents. We investigate this by analyzing how to aggregate decisions from n experts, each receiving a private signal about an unknown state. Assuming signals are conditionally independent and identically distributed, we depart from the fully rational paradigm and model expert behavior using quantal response, a stochastic choice model capturing bounded rationality. Within a minimax regret framework, we show that majority voting is the optimal robust aggregator when individual rationality falls below a certain threshold. Interestingly, such groups can outperform perfectly rational agents, as their decision randomness encodes weak but informative signals lost in deterministic behavior. We validate these findings using large language models (LLMs), which naturally exhibit quantal response via their temperature parameter. Aggregating moderately stochastic LLM outputs significantly improves accuracy on complex reasoning tasks, highlighting bounded rationality not as a limitation, but as a potential strength in collective intelligence.

</details>


### [901] [Chance-Constrained Correlated Equilibria for Robust Noncooperative Coordination](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.14141)
*Jaehan Im,Ufuk Topcu,David Fridovich-Keil*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 本文研究具有成本不确定性的相关均衡问题，提出机会约束相关均衡框架，保证激励相容性达到预设置信水平，并分析不确定性对协调结果的影响。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 相关均衡机制的有效性依赖于对代理成本结构的准确了解。当成本参数不确定时，推荐行动可能不再满足激励相容性，代理可能从偏离推荐中获益。需要一种能够处理成本不确定性的相关均衡框架。

Method: 提出机会约束相关均衡问题公式，考虑代理成本的不确定性，保证激励相容性达到预设置信水平。推导敏感性结果，量化个体激励约束不确定性对期望协调结果的影响。分析信息价值，将减少不确定性的边际效益与激励约束的对偶敏感性联系起来。

Result: 分析表明增加置信水平并不总是有益的，会在鲁棒性和系统效率之间引入权衡。数值实验证明所提框架在不确定环境中保持协调性能，与理论分析一致。

Conclusion: 机会约束相关均衡框架能够有效处理成本不确定性，敏感性分析为信息获取优先级提供指导，揭示了鲁棒性与效率之间的权衡关系。

Abstract: Correlated equilibria enable a coordinator to influence the self-interested agents by recommending actions that no player has an incentive to deviate from. However, the effectiveness of this mechanism relies on accurate knowledge of the agents' cost structures. When cost parameters are uncertain, the recommended actions may no longer be incentive compatible, allowing agents to benefit from deviating from them. We study a chance-constrained correlated equilibrium problem formulation that accounts for uncertainty in agents' costs and guarantees incentive compatibility with a prescribed confidence level. We derive sensitivity results that quantify how uncertainty in individual incentive constraints affects the expected coordination outcome. In particular, the analysis characterizes the value of information by relating the marginal benefit of reducing uncertainty to the dual sensitivities of the incentive constraints, providing guidance on which sources of uncertainty should be prioritized for information acquisition. The results further reveal that increasing the confidence level is not always beneficial and can introduce a tradeoff between robustness and system efficiency. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework maintains coordination performance in uncertain environments and are consistent with the theoretical insights developed in the analysis.

</details>


### [902] [Strategic Partitioning and Manipulability in Two-Round Elections](https://arxiv.org/abs/2603.15338)
*Emilio De Santis,Antonio Di Crescenzo,Verdiana Mustaro*

Main category: cs.GT

TL;DR: 研究两轮选举模型，分析如何通过最优初始分区最大化目标候选人获胜概率，发现渐近最优分区宽度为候选人总数的五分之一


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究两轮选举中初始分区策略对候选人获胜概率的影响，为选举策略设计提供理论依据

Method: 采用空间投票模型和概率框架，基于循环构造的偏好列表和均匀分布的理想点，分析不同分区策略下的获胜概率

Result: 推导出渐近最优分区宽度为候选人总数的1/5，并通过仿真验证了理论结果，显示随着选民规模增大，获胜概率趋近于1

Conclusion: 两轮选举中存在最优初始分区策略，渐近最优分区宽度为总候选人数的五分之一，这一发现为选举制度设计提供了重要理论指导

Abstract: We consider a two-round election model involving $m$ voters and $n$ candidates. Each voter is endowed with a strict preference list ranking the candidates. In the first round, the candidates are partitioned into two subsets, $A$ and $B$, and voters select their preferred candidate from each. Provided there are no ties, the two respective winners advance to a second round, where voters choose between them according to their initial preference lists. We analyze this scenario using a probabilistic framework based on a spatial voting model with cyclically constructed preference lists and uniformly distributed ideal points. Our objective is to determine the optimal initial partition of $A$ and $B$ that maximizes a target candidate's probability of winning. We analytically evaluate this success probability and derive its asymptotic behavior as the number of candidates $n \to \infty$. A key finding is that the asymptotically optimal relative width of the main discrete cluster converges precisely to one-fifth of the total number of candidates. Finally, we provide computational results and confidence intervals derived from simulation algorithms that validate the analytical framework. Specifically, we demonstrate that the probability of the universal victory event rapidly approaches $1$ as the electorate size increases.

</details>
